     the Fermi energy is    -1.0331 ev

!    total energy              =  -10090.53750674 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          9.6E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.15226931 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -221487.08907549 Ry
